hero.title: Kairos Route
hero.subtitle: At the intersection of AI, art, and digital content.
hero.desc: Building innovative solutions, unique illustrations, and insightful content in the evolving digital landscape.

about.title: A Digital Nomad in the AI Era
about.p1: I am a digital entrepreneur and content creator focused on exploring the capabilities of artificial intelligence to transform the way we create and consume digital products.
about.p2: From Galicia to the world, I manage multiple brands and projects ranging from compliance documentation for the EU AI Act to artistic illustrations and educational newsletters.
about.p3: My goal is to bridge the gap between complex technology and practical, creative applications that provide real value to independent creators and businesses.
